'''鈭歾h-b-l''' ('''zhabala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lurkmore|lurkmore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lurkmore|lurkmore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-b-l
|-
! Lemma
| zhabala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhabalithi|zhabalithi]] || [[word:zhabaliji|zhabaliji]] || [[word:zhabalishi|zhabalishi]] || [[word:zhabali|zhabali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabaluthuth|zhabaluthuth]] || [[word:zhabalujuj|zhabalujuj]] || [[word:zhabalushush|zhabalushush]] || [[word:zhabal|zhabal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabaluthu|zhabaluthu]] || [[word:zhabaluju|zhabaluju]] || [[word:zhabalushu|zhabalushu]] || [[word:zhabalu|zhabalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabalufuth|zhabalufuth]] || [[word:zhabalufuj|zhabalufuj]] || [[word:zhabalufush|zhabalufush]] || [[word:zhabaluf|zhabaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhabalethe|zhabalethe]] || [[word:zhabaleje|zhabaleje]] || [[word:zhabaleshe|zhabaleshe]] || [[word:zhabale|zhabale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabalothoth|zhabalothoth]] || [[word:zhabalojoj|zhabalojoj]] || [[word:zhabaloshosh|zhabaloshosh]] || [[word:zhabal|zhabal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabalotho|zhabalotho]] || [[word:zhabalojo|zhabalojo]] || [[word:zhabalosho|zhabalosho]] || [[word:zhabalo|zhabalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabalofoth|zhabalofoth]] || [[word:zhabalofoj|zhabalofoj]] || [[word:zhabalofosh|zhabalofosh]] || [[word:zhabalof|zhabalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhabal忙th忙|zhabal忙th忙]] || [[word:zhabal忙j忙|zhabal忙j忙]] || [[word:zhabal忙sh忙|zhabal忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhabal忙|zhabal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabalathath|zhabalathath]] || [[word:zhabalajaj|zhabalajaj]] || [[word:zhabalashash|zhabalashash]] || [[word:zhabal|zhabal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabalatha|zhabalatha]] || [[word:zhabalaja|zhabalaja]] || [[word:zhabalasha|zhabalasha]] || [[word:zhabala|zhabala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabalafath|zhabalafath]] || [[word:zhabalafaj|zhabalafaj]] || [[word:zhabalafash|zhabalafash]] || [[word:zhabalaf|zhabalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhabalasha|zhabalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhabalasha|gozhabalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhabalasha|gokizhabalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhabaln眉sha|zhabaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhabalnkn眉sha|gozhabalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhabaln眉sha|gokizhabaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhabalsh毛sha|zhabalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhabalnksh毛sha|gozhabalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhabalsh毛sha|gokizhabalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhabalrosha|zhabalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhabalnkrosha|gozhabalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhabalrosha|gokizhabalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhabalmusha|zhabalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhabalnkmusha|gozhabalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhabalmusha|gokizhabalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhabalsherasha|zhabalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhabalnksherasha|gozhabalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhabalsherasha|gokizhabalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhabalngasha|zhabalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhabalnkngasha|gozhabalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhabalngasha|gokizhabalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhabalyasha|zhabalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhabalnkyasha|gozhabalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhabalyasha|gokizhabalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhabalyamasha|zhabalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhabalnkyamasha|gozhabalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhabalyamasha|gokizhabalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhabaln眉sh毛sha|zhabaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhabalnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhabalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhabaln眉sh毛sha|gokizhabaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhabaln眉rosha|zhabaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhabalnkn眉rosha|gozhabalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhabaln眉rosha|gokizhabaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhabaln眉musha|zhabaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhabalnkn眉musha|gozhabalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhabaln眉musha|gokizhabaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhabalsh毛n眉sha|zhabalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhabalnksh毛n眉sha|gozhabalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhabalsh毛n眉sha|gokizhabalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhabalsh毛rosha|zhabalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhabalnksh毛rosha|gozhabalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhabalsh毛rosha|gokizhabalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhabalsh毛musha|zhabalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhabalnksh毛musha|gozhabalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhabalsh毛musha|gokizhabalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhabalron眉sha|zhabalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhabalnkron眉sha|gozhabalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhabalron眉sha|gokizhabalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhabalrosh毛sha|zhabalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhabalnkrosh毛sha|gozhabalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhabalrosh毛sha|gokizhabalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhabalromusha|zhabalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhabalnkromusha|gozhabalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhabalromusha|gokizhabalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhabalmun眉sha|zhabalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhabalnkmun眉sha|gozhabalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhabalmun眉sha|gokizhabalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhabalmush毛sha|zhabalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhabalnkmush毛sha|gozhabalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhabalmush毛sha|gokizhabalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhabalmurosha|zhabalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhabalnkmurosha|gozhabalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhabalmurosha|gokizhabalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhabal|zhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙b忙l|zh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhabal|hozhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙b忙l|hozh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhabal|hohozhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙b忙l|hohozh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhabal|n眉zhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙b忙l|n眉zh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhabal|n眉n眉zhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙b忙l|n眉n眉zh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhabal|n茂zhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙b忙l|n茂zh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhabal|n茂n茂zhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙b忙l|n茂n茂zh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhabal|luzhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙b忙l|luzh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhabal|luluzhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙b忙l|luluzh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhabal|lizhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙b忙l|lizh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhabal|lilizhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙b忙l|lilizh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhabal|kozhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙b忙l|kozh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhabal|kokozhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙b忙l|kokozh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhabal|kezhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙b忙l|kezh忙b忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhabal|kekezhabal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙b忙l|kekezh忙b忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
